summary_en: 1,386,600 shares acquired (4.25% of shares outstanding) for ¥913.8M via ToSTNeT-3 on 2026-05-27. Cumulative execution: 92.4% of authorized limit (1.5M shares, ¥988.5M ceiling). Program concluded.
title_en: Notice of Acquisition Results and Completion of Share Buyback via Off-Exchange Transaction (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief: Yushin Company executed its share buyback program on 2026-05-27, acquiring 1,386,600 shares of common stock for a total of ¥913,769,400 via ToSTNeT-3 off-exchange transaction on the Tokyo Stock Exchange. This represents 4.25% of shares outstanding. The acquisition was authorized by board resolution on 2026-05-26 with an upper limit of 1,500,000 shares (4.59% of S/O) and a total expenditure ceiling of ¥988,500,000. With this execution, the company has completed the buyback program, having consumed approximately 92.4% of the authorized share limit and 92.4% of the authorized yen ceiling. The stated rationale is improvement in capital efficiency and enhancement of shareholder returns.
